title: wt.exe
html:
wt.exe

Windows Terminal

Paths

  • C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.WindowsTerminal_<version_packageid>\wt.exe

Commands

Execute

Execute a command via Windows Terminal.

Use case: Use wt.exe as a proxy binary to evade defensive counter-measures

Privileges: User
